description: A project manager needs to order the new server and firewall required for an upcoming project.

nodes.task_description: Review the project quote to get the exact make and model of the hardware to be ordered.

expected_outcome.value: The PM has the correct hardware specifications.

nodes.task_description: Place the order with the preferred hardware distributor.
Track the order and update the project plan with the estimated delivery date.

expected_outcome.value: The project plan is updated with the hardware delivery timeline.
